description: Economics dashboard. Revenue panels use selected-range payment history; pricing panels show pricing seen in the last 24 hours rather than authoritative current network state.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_ts, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS time,
    toFloat64(sum(face_value_wei)) / 1e18 AS total_revenue_eth
FROM naap.canonical_payment_links
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_ts)
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Gateway Ticket Face Value (ETH, selected range)

targets.rawSql:
WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
latest_quotes AS (
    SELECT orch_address, last_seen, ifNull(model_id, '') AS model_id, price_per_unit, pixels_per_unit
    FROM (
        SELECT orch_address, org, last_seen, model_id, price_per_unit, pixels_per_unit,
            row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY orch_address, ifNull(model_id, '') ORDER BY last_seen DESC, org DESC) AS rn
        FROM naap.api_observed_capability_pricing
        WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
        AND price_per_unit > 0
        AND pixels_per_unit > 0
        AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
        AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
        AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
    )
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT q.last_seen AS "Quote Time",
    ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(q.orch_address, 8), '...', right(q.orch_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator",
    q.orch_address AS "Orchestrator Address",
    q.model_id AS "Model",
    round(toFloat64(q.price_per_unit) * 1000000.0 / toFloat64(q.pixels_per_unit) / 1000000000.0, 4) AS "Price (gwei/MP)"
FROM latest_quotes q
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = q.orch_address
ORDER BY "Quote Time" DESC, "Price (gwei/MP)" DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Latest Pricing Seen in 24h by Orchestrator

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM naap.api_observed_capability_pricing WHERE org != '' AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY org
list.label: Org
list.name: org
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM naap.api_observed_capability_pricing WHERE org != '' AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY org

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM naap.api_observed_capability_pricing WHERE model_id != '' AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) ORDER BY model_id
list.label: Model
list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM naap.api_observed_capability_pricing WHERE model_id != '' AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) ORDER BY model_id

list.definition: SELECT i.orch_address AS __value, i.orch_label AS __text FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity i INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.api_observed_capability_pricing WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))) p ON p.orch_address = i.orch_address ORDER BY __text
list.label: Orchestrator (ENS)
list.name: orchestrator
list.query: SELECT i.orch_address AS __value, i.orch_label AS __text FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity i INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.api_observed_capability_pricing WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))) p ON p.orch_address = i.orch_address ORDER BY __text
